response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals across 18+ years and recent exposure to AI infrastructure (MCP, agent frameworks), he lacks the specialized AI expertise required for this principal engineer role. The position requires demonstrated expertise in AI/ML with built products, advanced degree in AI, and cloud platform strategy—none of which are evident beyond 6 months of recent infrastructure work. He would be better suited for principal engineer roles in software engineering or infrastructure.
strengths: Exceptional software craftsmanship with proven TDD, CI/CD, and clean code practices across 18+ years in multiple languages and domains
Entrepreneurial experience through founding GISCollective (10 years) and contributing to growth-stage companies, demonstrating business acumen
Strong multi-disciplinary technical foundation spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with modern cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: Lacks specialized AI/ML expertise—recent MCP work is infrastructure-focused, not AI domain expertise; no ML background, no papers, or recognized AI contributions
No demonstrated AI products or platforms built, and missing preferred master's/PhD in AI; current AI exposure is only 6 months at re:cinq
Limited evidence of director-level strategic leadership, cloud platform strategy, or advising customers on cutting-edge technologies; currently in 7-month career gap
